rationale: Seeing the exact counts and names is easiest via the chart’s options menu, which typically offers “View data/Show records” to list values with counts.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart
rationale: Hovering the smallest bars should show a tooltip with the agent’s name and incident count; this area likely corresponds to one of the minimum bars.

action_text: Hover over the neighboring small bar near the right end
rationale: If the previous hover misses, try an adjacent small bar to reveal the tooltip for another likely minimum-count agent.

action_text: Hover over a different small bar near the right edge
rationale: Another nearby small bar may be the true minimum; hovering here could expose the agent name and exact count.

action_text: Scroll down the page to look for a data table beneath the chart
rationale: If additional data is shown below the chart, scrolling can reveal a data table or details that list agents and counts directly.
